visual_description: In a dimly lit, industrial-looking room, a shirtless man with boxing gloves lies on a table. An older man in a suit stands to the left, holding a hat, while another man with a shaved head sits on the right, looking down at the prone man. In the background, other figures are visible, including a man in a white shirt and another in a dark shirt.
